name: Brunswick County Schools
searchAliases: Brunswick County North Carolina school calendar
districtFact: Brunswick County Schools publishes traditional school calendar PDFs with student first and last days, workdays, district professional development days, holidays, annual leave, report card dates, semester endings, graduation schedules, school hours, and weather make-up notes.

about.title: About Brunswick County Schools
about.content: Brunswick County Schools serves students and families in Brunswick County, North Carolina, including coastal and inland communities such as Bolivia, Leland, Shallotte, and Southport. The district calendar includes student first and last days, required and non-required workdays, district professional development days, holidays, annual vacation leave, report card release dates, semester and quarter endings, graduation schedules, school hours, and school closing notes.

about.title: Which BCS Calendar Should You Use?
about.content: Most students follow the traditional Brunswick County Schools calendar. The district also publishes an Early College calendar for some years, so families should confirm the student's school or program before relying on first day, break, workday, or graduation dates.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Brunswick County Families
content: Use the printable calendars page as the source of record for official BCS PDFs and revisions.
Track required workdays, non-required workdays, and district PD days as student no-school dates.
Check the school closing note before planning around weather make-up days because BCS may use early release days or Saturdays.
Confirm graduation times, athletic events, testing dates, and program-specific dates through school announcements.

compareIntro: Compare the Brunswick County Schools calendar with other North Carolina district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Which Brunswick County calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the Brunswick County Schools traditional school calendar for the listed school years.

districtFaqs.q: Does Brunswick County Schools publish an Early College calendar?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. BCS publishes an Early College calendar for 2026-2027 in addition to the traditional calendar.

districtFaqs.q: Are BCS workdays student no-school days?
districtFaqs.a: For family planning, required workdays, non-required workdays, district professional development days, and annual leave dates should be treated as no-school days for students unless BCS announces a make-up change.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify BCS calendar updates?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Brunswick County Schools printable calendars page and school announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with BCS.
